reasoning: The control AU-12(3) focuses on audit record generation and ensuring that changes by authorized individuals are logged. In Kubernetes, this maps to enabling audit logging, configuring audit policies to capture relevant metadata, ensuring logs are retained for a specific period, and ensuring that changes made by authorized users are logged. These checks ensure that Kubernetes audit logs are comprehensive and meet compliance requirements.
